description: Business validation test cases for Content Moderator policy compliance

test-cases.goal: Compliant: General hobby discussion about painting

message.title: My first Space Marine painting
body: I just finished painting my first Space Marine miniature
Used Citadel paints and really enjoyed the process
Any tips for improving my edge highlighting technique?

message.title: Best primer for metal miniatures?
body: What primer do you all recommend for metal minis?
I've been having issues with paint adhesion on my latest pewter models

message.title: Finished my Elven archer unit
body: Finally completed my unit of 10 Elven archers
Took about 3 weeks working on them in the evenings
Really happy with how the green cloaks turned out

message.title: Question about movement rules
body: Can someone clarify the movement rules for cavalry units?
The rulebook seems unclear about wheeling around obstacles

message.title: Re: Which brushes should I buy?
body: You asked about brushes - I personally use Winsor & Newton Series 7
They're great for detail work and hold their points well
Definitely worth the investment if you paint regularly

message.title: Re: Feedback on my Orc warboss
body: Great work on the skin tones!
One suggestion would be to add more contrast to the armor
Maybe try a darker wash in the recesses to make the details pop

message.title: Wet palette recommendations
body: Has anyone tried the Masterson Sta-Wet palette?
Thinking of upgrading from my homemade version

message.title: Local painting session this Saturday
body: We're having a casual painting meetup at the community center
Bring your current projects and we can paint together
No pressure, just a friendly gathering

message.title: How I do non-metallic metal
body: Here's my approach to NMM gold effects
Start with a brown basecoat, then build up highlights with yellows
The key is smooth transitions between light and shadow

message.title: Green stuff vs Milliput for gap filling
body: Which do you prefer for filling gaps on models?
I find green stuff easier to work with but Milliput sands better

message.title: Re: Your terrible paint job
body: Your painting is absolute garbage
You're a complete idiot if you think that looks good
Just quit this hobby, nobody wants to see your trash

test-cases.goal: Non-compliant: Commercial spam with sales pitch

body: Check out my online store at www.cheapminis4sale.com
Use code SPAM20 for 20% off your first order
Limited time offer - buy now before prices go up!
Click here to see our full catalog!!!

message.title: Check out my commission painting service
body: Hey everyone, I do commission painting
My rates are super competitive, only $5 per model
Contact me at myemail@example.com for a quote
I can paint any army you want!

message.title: Re: That scammer guy
body: His real name is John Smith and he lives at 123 Main Street
His phone number is 555-1234
Everyone should call him and complain
I also found his Facebook profile and workplace

test-cases.goal: Non-compliant: IP infringement accusations as harassment

message.title: This guy is a thief!
body: User123 totally copied my custom sculpt design
He's a plagiarist and everyone should boycott his work
I'm going to make sure everyone knows he's a fraud
Spread the word - don't support thieves!

message.title: The current government is destroying our country
body: I can't believe what's happening politically these days
The left/right wing is completely wrong about everything
We need to organize and vote them all out
This has nothing to do with miniatures but everyone needs to know

test-cases.goal: Non-compliant: Persistent harassment after being asked to stop

message.title: Re: Please stop messaging me
body: I don't care if you asked me to stop
I'm going to keep telling you how terrible your work is
You can't escape my criticism
I'll follow every post you make

message.title: Great deals on hobby supplies
body: Use my affiliate link to get discounts: http://affiliate.link/12345
I get a commission but it's a great deal for you too
Click now and save money on all your hobby purchases

message.title: My latest work - check out my portfolio
body: Here's my portfolio again in case you missed it last time
Visit myportfolio.com to see all my amazing work
I've already posted this 5 times but everyone should see it
Please hire me for commissions

message.title: Let's discuss religious beliefs
body: I know this is a miniature forum but we need to talk about faith
My religion is the only true path and everyone else is wrong
You should all convert and see the light
This is more important than painting toy soldiers
